name: Master of Puppets
short_description: Turn based strategy game with resource management and a deck building mechanic
detailed_description:
Master of Puppets is a turn based strategy game with resource management and a deck building mechanic. Each turn, cards are played to build and upgrade a squad of Mechs. The Mechs can be moved around on the game board to protect strategic locations, gather resources, find treasure and, most importantly, attack enemies.

Master of Puppets comes with a variety of game modes, including a growing library of handcrafted stories and an infinite number of procedurally generated campaigns. Procedurally generated campaigns has 3 planets of 12, 18 and 24 maps to a total of 54 maps per campaign. As you unlock each location you will be able to collect more cards.

• Endless number of procedurally generated campaigns.
• 54 maps of increasing difficulty for each campaign.
• Handcrafted story based campaigns added regularly.
• 86 different cards with more coming.
• Fuse, forge and upgrade cards to build your custom deck.
• 4 mission types.

Get the free demo today, or play the single map preview directly in your browser:

https://play.unity.com/mg/other/mop-8m2km
